ground_truth.title: Headphones News
ground_truth.main_content:
Latest Headphones News

SEE HEADPHONES STORIES BY CATEGORY

Apple hasn’t fixed the AirPods Max’s most annoying design flaw 
If you were hoping Apple would swap out the delicate mesh in the AirPods Max’s headband with a more durable material, bad news. 
By Ben Patterson 1 year ago

Our favorite noise-cancelling Bose headphones are $249 for now
You can get the Bose QuietComfort for $100 off at Amazon, but the deal won't last forever.
By Gabriela Vatu 1 year ago

The Sonos Ace marks Sonos' expansion into ANC headphones
Does the multi-room audio trendsetter have an Ace up its sleeve, or are we about to see a rare royal flush?
By Jonathan Takiff 2 years ago

EarFun unwraps Wave Pro headphone and UBoom X speaker
At CES 2024, EarFun adds two more feature-packed audio products that retail at bargain prices.
By James Barber 2 years ago

Sennheiser bows new earbuds and headphones at CES 2024 
The German headphone manufacturer debuted three new products at the show. 
By Jonathan Takiff 2 years ago

Mojawa's new bone conduction earphones boast sports tracking
The HaptiFit Terra bone conduction earphones offer 32GB of onboard storage, allowing athletes to leave their phones and watches behind during a workout. 
By James Barber 2 years ago

JBL to deliver a wide array of new headphones in 2024
JBL says its latest headphones—slated to start arriving in March—are all about giving customers the exact options they need.
By James Barber 2 years ago

Raycon ups its audio game with Everyday Pro headphones, buds
After building a loyal following through its viral marketing, the company looks to go upscale with its new hybrid ANC models.
By James Barber 2 years ago

Sonos headphones may arrive as soon as April, report says 
A slew of upcoming Sonos products just got leaked, including the long-rumored headphones, a TV set-up box, a new high-end soundbar, and more. 
By Ben Patterson 2 years ago

Anker's first open-ear wireless buds support Sony's LDAC codec 
The open-ear Soundcore AeroFit Pro support the high-resolution LDAC codec at an affordable price. 
By Ben Patterson 2 years ago

Google's Pixel Buds Pro get conversation detection, clearer calls
Your Pixel Buds Pro will soon be able to pause the music when you start chatting, as well as serve up better call quality and warn you if your tunes are too loud.
By Ben Patterson 2 years ago

Focal Bathys users can customize their headphone experience
Mimi Hearing Test integration allows Bathys users to tailor the headphone's performance to their personal hearing. You can buy a new color, too.
By Michael Brown 2 years ago

Bose dials up spatial audio with new headphones and earbuds
The QuietComfort Ultra headphones and earbuds mark Bose's belated entry into the spatial audio arena. Snapdragon Sound with aptX Adaptive is another welcome highlight.
By Jonathan Takiff 2 years ago

Apple's AirPods Pro 2 is getting a USB-C charging case
The new charging case will allow not only charging via a USB-C cable and a power adapter, but also from a USB-C-equipped iPhone.
By Ben Patterson 2 years ago

Apple September event 2023: AirPods, HomePod, and more
Word is that Apple will be showing off a new AirPods Pro model alongside the iPhone 15 Pro at its September event. What about the HomePod and Apple TV?
By Ben Patterson 2 years ago

Samsung rolls out Auracast broadcast audio to select TVs and Galaxy Buds
Thanks to a new Bluetooth LE Audio feature, you'll soon be able to connect a bevy of Samsung earbuds to select Samsung smart TVs.
By Ben Patterson 2 years ago

Marshall Motif II ANC earbuds to arrive September 12
We praised the original for great sound, comfortable fit, strong noise cancellation, and long battery life. Improvements are promised on all four counts.
By Michael Brown 2 years ago

Your AirPods are about to get smarter about muting distractions
Apple's upcoming iOS 17 update will make your AirPods better at adapting to changing ambient sound conditions, among other improvements.
By Ben Patterson 2 years ago

Sony WF-1000XM5 ANC earbuds: Our hands-on preview
We have the product in hand, but a technical snafu related to access to Sony’s beta software has delayed our official review.
By Theo Nicolakis 2 years ago

Beyerdynamic adds ANC to its Blue Byrd in-ear headphones
The second generation of Beyerdynamic’s Blue Byrd neckband headphone features active noise cancellation.
By Michael Brown 2 years ago
with: Apple hasn’t fixed the AirPods Max’s most annoying design flaw
The Sonos Ace marks Sonos' expansion into ANC headphones
Bose dials up spatial audio with new headphones and earbuds
Samsung rolls out Auracast broadcast audio to select TVs and Galaxy Buds
Your AirPods are about to get smarter about muting distractions
without: TechHive helps you find your tech sweet spot.
